description_long: This object is a solid, rounded form with a smooth, matte yellowish-tan surface, lacking any visible strings, frets, or hardware typically associated with a guitar. The body is circular and featureless, with no discernible neck, headstock, or cutaways, and the surface appears uniformly colored with subtle shading. There are no visible seams, joints, or decorative elements, and the object is entirely opaque. The overall shape is reminiscent of a thick disc or puck, with gently beveled edges and a consistent thickness throughout. The lack of any visible controls, pickups, or bridge suggests a highly abstract or stylized representation. Its size and proportions do not match those of a standard guitar, and it appears to be a simplified or placeholder model.
description: A smooth, circular, yellowish-tan object with a matte finish and no visible guitar features. The surface is featureless and uniformly colored.
description_view_0: A flat, circular yellowish-tan surface with no visible details or features.
description_view_1: Another flat, circular view, nearly identical to view 0, with uniform color and no distinguishing marks.
description_view_2: The same circular form, with a slight shadow or subtle mark visible on the surface.
description_view_3: A circular, featureless surface with a small dark spot near the edge, otherwise identical to other views.
